boosters.name: gstack
boosters.description: A bundle of 30+ specialist workflows by Garry Tan including browser-based QA (/qa), security audits (/cso), staff-engineer code review (/review), design reviews (/design-review), systematic debugging (/investigate), and product interrogation (/office-hours). Activate with --booster gstack to enhance Execute, Create PRD, and Generate Implementation Plan loops.
